title: Inventory Search
description: Allows the player to search and highlight specified item name inside containers and inventory.
body:
# Mod Information
Allows the user to seach inventories for specified items. Use the search bar to type what you are looking to search for.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fe779b0088155a2223e04cf2191d69980e6e47e_0.webp)

# Mod Settings
The mod settings are handled by Mod Menu and AutoConfig. 

By default, the highlight color in GUIs is orange and the search will persist automatically through GUIs.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac509d772eeba3a4b247ddcaec88aff37f762bb3_0.webp)
